comment: Airwindows-inspired custom tape echo for Zoom Multistomp. Uses ctx[3] for a bounded stereo delay line, TapeHack-style soft clipping, tape-bandwidth filtering, flutter/wow modulation, and a BPM+division tempo workflow. Hardware untested.

params.name: Tempo
params.comment: BPM source for synced delay times. Descriptor is marked with the stock tempo flag pattern; true tap-tempo host writes still need hardware proof.

params.name: Div
params.comment: Discrete musical division selector inside the DSP: 1/16, 1/8T, 1/8, dotted 1/8, 1/4, dotted 1/4.

params.name: Feed
params.comment: Feedback amount, intentionally capped below runaway.

params.name: Wear
params.comment: Narrows the feedback bandwidth to approximate aged tape/echo-head frequency response.

params.name: Drive
params.comment: TapeHack-style soft clipping into the record path.

params.name: Spread
params.comment: Small stereo delay offset and opposite flutter phase for width.
